Welcome to Study Engine
Create your first course to start building your spaced repetition library. Import cards, add lecture context, and let the AI tutor personalise your review sessions.
Or import a JSON card batch from the sidebar

Your courses are ready
Add study cards to start your first review session. Import a JSON batch, add cards manually, or let the AI generate cards from your lecture materials.
Tip: Import lecture PDFs in your course settings to generate AI-powered cards

stability > 30d
Avg Retention ⓘAverage probability you can recall all your reviewed cards right now. Calculated by FSRS from each card's stability and time since last review. The retention forecast graph shows how this decays over 30 days without review.

success after re-study
Model split
—
Flash / Pro calls
Calibration ⓘMeasures how accurately you judge your own knowledge. Compares your self-ratings against AI grading on generative tiers (Explain, Apply, Distinguish, Mock). 75%+ means well-calibrated. Below 55% means you may be overconfident. Only updates after generative-tier reviews.

Your Turn
⌘/Ctrl + Enter to submit · Esc to exit
How well did you know that?
You learned 0 concepts.
0 cards ready for review.
Exit before finishing calibration?
Cards you just learned won't get reliable scheduling.
End session early?
Your progress on reviewed items is saved, but remaining items will not be scored. The FSRS schedule only updates for items you complete.
Unfinished session found
You can continue your last queue from a clean checkpoint, or discard it and start fresh.
Delete course?
This will remove the course and optionally its cards.
Delete all cards in this course?
This cannot be undone.
